# coreweave_sandbox_managed_runner (Data Source)

Read a CoreWeave Sandbox managed runner by ID or operator-assigned `runner_id`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coreweave_sandbox_managed_runner" "prod_east" {
  id = "prod-east-managed"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Server-assigned UUID, or the operator-assigned `runner_id`. UUID lookup is preferred and falls back to `runner_id` on no-match.

### Read-Only

- `active_config_version` (String)
- `active_profile_spec_version` (String)
- `active_revision` (Number)
- `allow_privileged_profile_annotations` (Boolean)
- `cluster_id` (String) CKS cluster UUID.
- `cluster_name` (String) CKS cluster display name.
- `connection_status` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `deployment_spec` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment_spec))
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable runner name.
- `enforce_resource_limits` (Boolean)
- `install_error` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--install_error))
- `install_status` (String)
- `last_heartbeat_at` (String)
- `maintenance_policy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--maintenance_policy))
- `management_mode` (String) Management mode (`MANAGEMENT_MODE_MANAGED` or `MANAGEMENT_MODE_SELF_MANAGED`).
- `overrides` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--overrides))
- `profile_bindings` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profile_bindings))
- `release_channel` (String) Release channel for automatic updates.
- `rollout_in_progress` (Boolean)
- `runner_group_id` (String) Runner group ID for scheduling affinity.
- `runner_id` (String) Operator-assigned runner identifier.
- `target_revision` (Number)
- `update_available` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `zone` (String) Geographic zone.

<a id="nestedatt--deployment_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deployment_spec`

Read-Only:

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `args` (List of String)
- `cpu_runtime_class` (String)
- `env` (Map of String)
- `gateway_server` (String)
- `gpu_runtime_class` (String)
- `image` (String)
- `image_pull_policy` (String)
- `init_resources` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment_spec--init_resources))
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `node_selector` (Map of String)
- `resources` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment_spec--resources))
- `scaling` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment_spec--scaling))
- `service_account` (String)
- `tolerations` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployment_spec--tolerations))
